module-2-community-website-history.label: Module Project: Build Volunteer Hub History
module-2-community-website-history.summary: Continue volunteer-hub and build focused content and style history.

try_module_2_community_website_history_s.title: Edit the Signup Heading
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.prompt:
Open `volunteer-hub/index.html`. Find the exact line `

Volunteer Signups

` and replace it with `

Volunteer Signups and Training

`. Save the file. Then type `git diff -- index.html` and press Enter.
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.hint: Replace only the supplied heading line.

help.concept: The file edit is fully specified; the project tests Git inspection, not HTML knowledge.
help.hint_1: Do not change the title or any other line.
help.hint_2: Inspect the saved working-tree change before staging.

try_module_2_community_website_history_s.instructions:
Open `volunteer-hub/index.html`. Find the exact line `

Volunteer Signups

` and replace it with `

Volunteer Signups and Training

`. Save the file. Then type `git diff -- index.html` and press Enter.

zoeskoul_setup_sh.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf -- volunteer-hub mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub git -C volunteer-hub init -q -b main git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner' git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s '# Volunteer Hub Volunteer signups and schedules. ' > volunteer-hub/README.md mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s ' Volunteer Hub

Volunteer Signups

' > volunteer-hub/index.html mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 12px; } ' > volunteer-hub/styles.css mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub/notes printf %s 'Orientation: Saturday 10 AM ' > volunteer-hub/notes/schedule.txt git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Start volunteer hub'

#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf -- volunteer-hub mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub git -C volunteer-hub init -q -b main git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner' git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s '# Volunteer Hub Volunteer signups and schedules. ' > volunteer-hub/README.md mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s ' Volunteer Hub

Volunteer Signups

' > volunteer-hub/index.html mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 12px; } ' > volunteer-hub/styles.css mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub/notes printf %s 'Orientation: Saturday 10 AM ' > volunteer-hub/notes/schedule.txt git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Start volunteer hub'

0.message: That action can discard or rewrite history. Use the safe, layer-specific workflow taught in this course.

try_module_2_community_website_history_s.title: Commit the Signup Heading
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.prompt: Type `git add index.html` and press Enter. Type `git diff --staged -- index.html` and press Enter. Then type `git commit -m "Add volunteer signup page"` and press Enter.
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.hint: Stage, inspect, and commit only index.html.

help.concept: The first Module 2 project purpose becomes its own commit.
help.hint_2: The working tree should be clean afterward.

try_module_2_community_website_history_s.solutionCode:
git add index.html
git diff --staged -- index.html
git commit -m "Add volunteer signup page"
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.instructions: Type `git add index.html` and press Enter. Type `git diff --staged -- index.html` and press Enter. Then type `git commit -m "Add volunteer signup page"` and press Enter.

try_module_2_community_website_history_s.title: Edit the Footer Spacing
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.prompt: Open `volunteer-hub/styles.css`. Find `footer { margin-top: 12px; }` and replace it with `footer { margin-top: 24px; }`. Save the file. Then type `git diff -- styles.css` and press Enter.

help.concept: A second exact edit creates a separate Git purpose without testing CSS knowledge.

try_module_2_community_website_history_s.instructions: Open `volunteer-hub/styles.css`. Find `footer { margin-top: 12px; }` and replace it with `footer { margin-top: 24px; }`. Save the file. Then type `git diff -- styles.css` and press Enter.

try_module_2_community_website_history_s.title: Stage and Review the Styles
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.prompt: Type `git add styles.css` and press Enter. Then type `git diff --staged -- styles.css` and press Enter.
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.hint: Review the exact staged style change before committing.

help.concept: The staged diff is the final review of the next snapshot.
help.hint_2: Do not amend the earlier commit.

try_module_2_community_website_history_s.solutionCode:
git add styles.css
git diff --staged -- styles.css
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.instructions: Type `git add styles.css` and press Enter. Then type `git diff --staged -- styles.css` and press Enter.

try_module_2_community_website_history_s.title: Audit the Volunteer Hub History
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.prompt: Type `git log --oneline` and press Enter. Then type `git show --stat --oneline HEAD` and press Enter. Type `git status --short` and press Enter.
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.hint: Read the three commits, inspect HEAD, and confirm clean state.

help.concept: This milestone proves the focused history before Module 3 continues the same repository.
help.hint_1: The newest commit should be Add volunteer page styles.
help.hint_2: The final short status should be empty.

try_module_2_community_website_history_s.starterCode:
# Volunteer Hub

Volunteer signups and schedules.
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.solutionCode:
git log --oneline
git show --stat --oneline HEAD
git status --short
try_module_2_community_website_history_s.instructions: Type `git log --oneline` and press Enter. Then type `git show --stat --oneline HEAD` and press Enter. Type `git status --short` and press Enter.

moduleProject.description: Do not start over. The project opens from the canonical Module 1 snapshot. Apply two exact text edits, inspect each one, and record them as separate focused commits. The resulting three-commit history continues into Module 3.
moduleProject.title: Build Focused Volunteer Hub History

intro-sketch.title: Continue Volunteer Hub
intro-sketch.bodyMarkdown: Do not start over. The project opens from the canonical Module 1 snapshot. Apply two exact text edits, inspect each one, and record them as separate focused commits. The resulting three-commit history continues into Module 3.
